heading: Definitions
label: 7001 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–479, title VI, § 601120 Stat. 3644Jan. 12, 2007“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Pacific Whiting Act of 2006’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–479, title VI, § 601120 Stat. 3644Jan. 12, 2007“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Pacific Whiting Act of 2006’.”

children.heading: Advisory panel
children.label: 1 Advisory panel
children.text: The term “advisory panel” means the Advisory Panel on Pacific Hake/Whiting established by the Agreement.

children.heading: Agreement
children.label: 2 Agreement
children.text: The term “Agreement” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States and the Government of Canada on Pacific Hake/Whiting, signed at Seattle, Washington, on .November 21, 2003

children.heading: Catch
children.label: 3 Catch
children.text: The term “catch” means all fishery removals from the offshore whiting resource, including landings, discards, and bycatch in other fisheries.

children.heading: Joint management committee
children.label: 4 Joint management committee
children.text: The term “joint management committee” means the joint management committee established by the Agreement.

children.heading: Joint technical committee
children.label: 5 Joint technical committee
children.text: The term “joint technical committee” means the joint technical committee established by the Agreement.

children.heading: Offshore whiting resource
children.label: 6 Offshore whiting resource
children.text: The term “offshore whiting resource” means the transboundary stock of Merluccius productus that is located in the offshore waters of the United States and Canada except in Puget Sound and the Strait of Georgia.

children.heading: Scientific review group
children.label: 7 Scientific review group
children.text: The term “scientific review group” means the scientific review group established by the Agreement.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 8 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: United States Section
children.label: 9 United States Section
children.text: The term “United States Section” means the United States representatives on the joint management committee.
